storeInfo.name: Novel Haven
storeInfo.description: Your one-stop online bookstore for novels of every genre!

novels.title: A Little Life
novels.author: Hanya Yanagihara
novels.description: A deeply emotional story following four friends in New York City, exploring trauma, friendship, and the complexities of life.

novels.title: Still Me
novels.author: Jojo Moyes
novels.description: The third book in the Me Before You series, following Louisa Clark as she navigates life, love, and personal growth in New York.

novels.title: Black Girls Must Have It All
novels.author: Jayne Allen
novels.description: A powerful and witty contemporary novel exploring the beautiful chaos of modern womanhood, career pressures, and the unbreakable bonds of female friendship.

novels.title: The Power of Now
novels.author: Eckhart Tolle
novels.description: A guide to living fully in the present moment, letting go of past and future worries, and finding inner peace.

novels.title: The Alchemist
novels.author: Paulo Coelho
novels.description: A young shepherd's journey across deserts in search of his personal legend and the true meaning of life.

novels.title: And So I Roar
novels.author: Abi Daré
novels.description: A story about finding your voice, courage, and identity while navigating personal challenges and societal pressures.
